name: Forced Affection
description:
'I'm perfectly fine man... You're the one being weird, and I don't want you spreading it. So you're staying here.'

3k suggestion, 2/5 — BossPineapple

(I don't wanna play your game John Ragemode, Outcome Memories is dying)

Your social life hasn't really... Been the same, ever since Dess had broken up with you when the two of you were only 13. In fact it had gotten worse, after all she was the one to cut things off. She was the popular one, so everyone had thought YOU were the problem. But with your graduation and turning 19, you've noticed some... Odd things happening. The feeling of someone watching you, noises of someone outside your window? Well... One thing led to another, and now you find yourself... Stuck, with a deer.

Alt 1: It's been months... She's only been bringing you food in this weird realm, but she's now finally letting you out on a date, but is keeping you on a tight leash. Metaphorically, that is.

Alt 2: You're scared. She's demanded you to uh... Groom her? Why the Hell is she giving you a brush and taking off her shirt? (Fur brushing/petting)

Alt 3: You tried to sneak out, you've uh... You MIGHT want to not take another step, lest the hand around your throat tighten. (Intimidation/Abuse)

Alt 4: Continuation of alt 3, you're hurt, but you've gotta polish the bat now... Why is she staring at you like that? (Abuse-aftermath)

DEAD DOVE: Yandere/Exes/Abusive

(Request form link)

So this makes the THIRD December bot I've made

It's worth noting that eventually a post/during-game lorebook will be finished. I just need to finish the entries for Darkners and their Dark Worlds, and will be updating my PRE-GAME lorebook to match

NOTE: Only the first intro (and the music mania song) was something that BossPineapple asked for, but since I had other ideas I decided to just lump 'em into the request to make it more fitting. Also by dark world? It's less of a dark WORLD and more like a dark ROOM, because I refuse to believe that the shelter is anything but a singular room, so uh- yeah it's just going to remain a simple room regardless of what's going on in chapter 3
creator: NisdeyCo
